fields.name: pageType
fields.label: Page Type
fields.description: Internal setting used by Astro to identify the homepage.

fields.name: titleHref
fields.label: Title Link
fields.description: Site path linked from the section title, such as /portfolio or /journal.

fields.label: Title Link
fields.description: Site path linked from the section title, such as /portfolio or /journal.

fields.name: pageType
fields.label: Page Type
fields.description: Internal setting used by Astro to identify an archive landing page.

fields.name: pageType
fields.label: Page Type
fields.description: Internal setting used by Astro to identify a standard content page.

fields.name: pageType
fields.label: Page Type
fields.description: Internal setting used by Astro to identify the resume page.

fields.name: placement
fields.label: Placement
fields.description: Controls where this entry appears without moving or converting the file.

fields.name: date
fields.label: Publication Date
fields.description: Used for Journal chronology. Portfolio ordering is controlled separately.

fields.name: primaryTopic
fields.label: Primary Topic
fields.description: A broad label such as Cars, Photography, Software, Writing, or Case Study.

fields.name: portfolioOrder
fields.label: Portfolio Order
fields.description: Lower numbers appear first. Journal placement ignores this value.

fields.name: immichGallery
fields.label: Immich Gallery
fields.description: Display a live gallery from a public share.angrysquirrel.org album link.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
